description: **OK Café** is hiring host cashiers at their Sandy Springs location, a family-owned restaurant that's been running for 37 years on hospitality and integrity. The posted pay runs $21–$23 an hour, and the benefits package includes health, dental, vision, life insurance, paid vacation, and 401k matching. No late nights, and they're closed on major holidays — solid setup if you want a people-facing role with a real family environment.

description: **Southeast Clips** is looking for full or part-time hairstylists and barbers at their Doraville location. They're the largest Great Clips franchisee in the country and put a lot of emphasis on effective wage, which factors in base pay, productivity, product commissions, and tips. Flexible hours and an established customer base make this a solid option if you're a licensed stylist looking for steady volume close to the metro area.

description: **Bibler Masonry Contractors, Inc.** is hiring a Construction Estimator out of their Roswell office. The role focuses on cost estimating and bid preparation for commercial buildings and industrial facilities, working closely with project teams on material takeoffs and budget management. Worth a look if you've got a background in commercial construction estimating.

description: **Milner Vein and Vascular LLC** is looking for a full-time Medical Assistant at their Tucker location. Day-to-day work includes collecting patient history, medications, and vitals, then documenting everything in the chart. They're specifically looking for a bilingual candidate who's a fast learner and committed to giving patients a great experience.

description: **Carenest Health Services** has a 13-week contract opening for a Registered Nurse with wound care experience. The schedule is Monday through Friday, 8am–4:30pm, and the role requires at least two years of recent wound care experience along with AHA BLS and CWOCN certification. Travel or contract nurses looking for a structured weekday schedule should take a look.

description: **Caring Hands United, Inc.** is looking for bilingual CNA and PCA caregivers in the Stone Mountain area for weekend daytime shifts. The role involves providing in-home care services for elderly clients and individuals with disabilities in the Alpharetta area. Good fit for a compassionate person who speaks Spanish and wants part-time work on weekends.
**Bonus help (free):** WorkSource Cobb is a free career resource for Cobb County residents. If you're job hunting, they offer services to help you get there. Worth checking out.

**Cobb County Sheriff's Office** is currently hiring. Open positions are listed on their careers page and cover a range of roles within the department. Worth a look if you're interested in public safety work close to home.

**Cobb County** posts its open government positions through governmentjobs.com, and there are active listings up now. Roles span departments across the county, so whether you're interested in admin, public works, or something else entirely, it's a good page to bookmark if you're job hunting locally.

**Cobb County School District** is posting employment opportunities on their careers page. If you've been thinking about working in education, whether in the classroom or in a support role, this is a good place to start browsing.

scraped_snippet: YMCA careers Atlanta offer rewarding roles to impact your community. Apply now to make a difference!
